message:
style(cli): apply rustfmt and clippy fixes across CLI commands

Replace redundant closures with std::sync::PoisonError::into_inner method
references, reformat long chains and match arms, simplify if-let patterns
in doctor.rs, and adjust line breaks per rustfmt rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
